title: Bridge Essay: Altered processing of self-produced sensations in psychosis at cortical and spin

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.

**Altered processing of self-produced sensations in psychosis at cortical and spinal levels.**. Mol Psychiatry.. PMID: 40715480. DOI: 10.1038/s41380-025-03130-w. Psychosis is often characterized by disturbances in the sense of self, with patients frequently misattributing self-produced sensations to external sources. While somatic hallucinations and misperceptions are common, the underlying disruptions in basic bodily self-processing remain unclear. We aimed to investigate processing of self-evoked sensations, including touch and interoception, in psychosis using amultimodal, multi-method approach.
